source_jobs.title: Senior Marketing Associate -  Social & Community
source_jobs.description:
Stronghold's mission is to provide fast, secure, and accessible financial services for all. Through our developer APIs, we enable pay-by-bank embedded payments and financial services while pushing the boundaries of financial innovation. Our SHx token is a key component of our ecosystem, supporting merchant rewards, DeFi-based financing, and governance.



We're a fast-moving, data-driven team committed to compliance, scalability, and innovation. We value curiosity, autonomy, and creative problem solving and we're looking for someone excited to bring a marketing edge.



About the Role


As our Senior Marketing Associate, you'll work across Stronghold and SHx to produce high-quality marketing content that supports social growth, campaign execution, and product storytelling. You'll manage and grow our online communities, serving as the team's ear to the ground on community sentiment by surfacing trends, concerns, and feedback and reporting findings back regularly. You'll operate in a fast-paced, execution-heavy role where you collaborate with the team to bring our brand voice to life across multiple platforms. This role reports to the Director of Marketing.



What You'll Do

 - Execute daily operations for Stronghold and SHx’s social presence (X, LinkedIn, YouTube, Discord, TikTok, Instagram).

 - Manage and grow online communities, including moderating conversations, responding to questions, and keeping members informed on product and ecosystem updates.

 - Serve as the team's ear to the ground and monitor community sentiment, surface emerging trends or concerns, and report findings back to the team regularly.

 - Use creative tooling to create marketing collateral: social assets, blog posts, visuals, email campaigns.

 - Manage a content calendar across channels in partnership with the team.

 - Repurpose long-form content into formats fit for social, email, or web.

 - Monitor engagement metrics and report insights to improve future campaigns.

 - Support campaign execution for SHx marketing, governance updates, and merchant rewards programs.

 - Stay current on fintech and crypto trends to inform timely, relevant content across both Stronghold and SHx audiences.



Who You Are

 - 3–7 years of experience in marketing, content, or social roles.

 - Strong writing skills with an eye for tone, clarity, and brand alignment.

 - Proficiency with AI tools and visual design platforms.

 - You’ve managed or contributed to social media channels and online communities.

 - Comfortable supporting brand voice and campaigns across both B2B and crypto-native audiences.

 - You’re a strong writer with a sharp eye for tone and clarity.

 - You’re organized, creative, self-motivated, and good at hitting deadlines.

 - Bonus: Familiarity with Discord, Telegram, Canva, Notion, HubSpot, or Figma.



Compensation & Details

 - Salary range: $110,000–$130,000 per year

 - Location: Must be located within a 25-mile radius of San Francisco; hybrid office schedule required.

 - Perks & Benefits: Health benefits, hands-on experience with leading-edge fintech and blockchain initiatives, and a team that values speed, curiosity, and autonomy.
   
   

If you’re ready to help grow SHx and Stronghold by executing fast and learning faster, we want to talk to you.

As an equal opportunity employer, Stronghold does not discriminate against any applicant or employee based on race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, religion, national origin, ancestry, age, disability, military or veteran status, genetic information or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws.

Authorized to work in the United States (required)

No visa sponsorship available at this time

source_jobs.title: Head of Capital Markets, SHx
source_jobs.description:
Stronghold's mission is to provide fast, secure, and accessible financial services for all. Through our developer APIs, we enable pay-by-bank embedded payments and financial services while pushing the boundaries of financial innovation. Our SHx token is a key component of our ecosystem, supporting merchant rewards, DeFi-based financing, and governance.



We're a fast-moving, data-driven team committed to compliance, scalability, and innovation. We value curiosity, autonomy, and creative problem solving and we're looking for someone excited to bring a marketing edge.

About the Role


Stronghold has entered a phase of hyper-growth and we are looking for a leader to run our SHx Markets vertical. The ideal candidate will have significant experience in capital markets and managing relationships across both crypto and traditional institutional participants. This leader will be responsible for expanding SHx markets infrastructure and assisting company efforts to grow market makers, add more brokers, exchange listings, and develop other institutional relationships and partnerships. This leader will work closely with a team of financial professionals on the SHx Markets team, they will be responsible for managing and expanding SHx liquidity to enhance utility and the health of the SHx ecosystem. Stronghold’s mission is to provide fast, secure, and accessible financial services for all  required digital asset efficiency and a healthy crypto market. Robust liquidity is a core component of making that mission a reality.


The Head of Markets will have a deep understanding of market structure, clearing, settlement, prime brokerage, and custody.  This leader will apply their  knowledge to the development of SHx markets. We seek a candidate with a vast network and a  stellar reputation with traditional market participants.


We’re looking for an entrepreneurial and experienced professional who excels at working with a distributed team. This person can think creatively about  how markets need to adapt to support potentially paradigm-shifting technology.



What You'll Do

 - Manage relationships with market makers, brokers, exchanges, liquidators, and institutional market participants globally

 - Work closely with the Markets Team to help guide company strategy for enterprise-grade infrastructure and solutions to attract and broaden SHx markets ecosystem

 - Manage relationships with key traditional market participants such as OTC trading desks, brokers, quantitative market makers, custodians, institutional market participants and prime brokers

 - Explore new and innovative ways to partner with existing market participants to accelerate SHx liquidity growth

 - Help develop crypto and traditional market infrastructure for SHx

 - Partner with internal stakeholders - product, engineering, business development, leadership - to construct the appropriate strategy for the market buildout

 - Collaborate with compliance, legal, business, and finance  to ensure efficient and compliant strategy execution



What We're Looking For

 - 10+ years experience in markets, with a focus on FX or commodities

 - 5+ years of management experience5+ years of business development and/or experience building strategic partnerships

 - Experienced negotiator who is excited by partnerships and deal-making

 - Preference for being both strategic and execution-oriented

 - A deep understanding of market structure and liquidity landscape

 - Familiarity with the cryptocurrency liquidity ecosystemAbility to work cross-functionally with internal stakeholders

 - Passion for payments, fintech, and Stronghold’s mission

 - Outstanding verbal and written communication skillsSerious attention to detail and a commitment to excellence

 - MBA or equivalent preferred

This role is based in our San Francisco Office and will be required to come on Monday, Wednesday & Thursday.


As an equal opportunity employer, Stronghold does not discriminate against any applicant or employe

source_jobs.title: Crypto Community Manager
source_jobs.description:
Stronghold's mission is to provide fast, secure, and accessible financial services for all. Through our developer APIs, we enable pay-by-bank embedded payments and financial services while pushing the boundaries of financial innovation. Our SHx token is a key component of our ecosystem, supporting merchant rewards, DeFi-based financing, and governance.



We're a fast-moving, data-driven team committed to compliance, scalability, and innovation. We value curiosity, autonomy, and creative problem solving and we're looking for someone excited to bring a marketing edge.

About the Role
As the Community Manager for SHx, you will serve as the primary face and voice of our token community, focused on building meaningful relationships, developing long-term engagement strategies, and representing SHx at events and conferences. You will own the entire community function — from planning activations to facilitating user feedback loops — with the goal of strengthening the SHx ecosystem across Discord, Twitter/X, and Telegram.
This role reports to the CEO and collaborates closely with our Marketing Associate, Content Producer, and Product Marketing teammates.




What You'll Do

 - Own and lead SHx’s community strategy, growth, and engagement across key platforms.

 - Respond to community inquiries and feedback with empathy and accuracy.

 - Represent SHx at industry meetups, events, and conferences.

 - Design and host virtual events like AMAs, webinars, and token updates.

 - Work closely with marketing and product to surface community insights.

 - Create updates and high-signal messaging tailored to SHx token holders and advocates.

 - Track engagement, sentiment, and report on community health to leadership.

 - Provide regular reports to leadership on community growth, engagement, and sentiment



What We're Looking For

 - 7+ years of experience in community management or a similar role, preferably in blockchain, fintech, or tech startups.

 - Demonstrated success in building and managing online communities.

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

 - Proficiency in social media platforms, community management tools, and analytics software.

 - Strong organizational skills and ability to juggle multiple projects.

 - Must be proficient in prompting AI tools like ChatGPT and/or Claude

 - Familiarity with cryptocurrency, blockchain technology, and SHx is a strong plus. A deep understanding of online communities and the ability to navigate the complexities of community dynamics.

 - Passion for building inclusive, engaged, and vibrant communities. A proactive, problem-solving approach with an ability to adapt to fast-changing environments. Must have the ability to remain professional and enthusiastic in the face of potential confrontation.



As an equal opportunity employer, Stronghold does not discriminate against any applicant or employee based on race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, religion, national origin, ancestry, age, disability, military or veteran status, genetic information or any other basis protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws.

Authorized to work in the United States (required)

No visa sponsorship available at this time

source_jobs.title: Senior Manager, Business Operations
source_jobs.description:
Stronghold's mission is to provide fast, secure, and accessible financial services for all. Through our developer APIs, we enable pay-by-bank embedded payments and financial services while pushing the boundaries of financial innovation. Our SHx token is a key component of our ecosystem, supporting merchant rewards, DeFi-based financing, and governance.



We're a fast-moving, data-driven team committed to compliance, scalability, and innovation. We value curiosity, autonomy, and creative problem solving and we're looking for someone excited to bring a marketing edge.



About the Company




Named a Forbes Fintech 50, Stronghold’s mission is to improve financial access by powering innovative payment and financial services solutions through our open APIs.  We’ve been going deep to lay the underlying rails for modern payments and reach all customers with secure, transparent ways to move money. We are seeking team players who can evolve with the company as we scale and add new products. We are a team of technologists and industry experts who take a data-driven and innovative approach to solving problems.  We power possibilities for our customers by bringing the best talent together in an open and collaborative work environment that rewards curiosity and grit.




Stronghold is proud of its SF Bay Area and New Zealand roots and strives to build a diverse team to serve our ecosystem better while staying true to our core values.  Our core values are to Be Self Aware, Have Good Judgment, Be Curious, Seek Innovation, Excellent Communication, High Impact, Be Bold, Be Selfless, Be Accountable, Be Honest, and Show Grit.




About the Role




Stronghold is seeking a Senior Manager of Business Operations to help manage and drive the success of our business. In this role, you will work closely with the Director of Business Operations to lead key initiatives that optimize payment processes, enhance operational efficiency, and support strategic growth. You will be at the forefront of managing day-to-day operations, implementing scalable solutions, and collaborating across teams to ensure our exceptional results. This is a unique opportunity to contribute directly to SHx’s ecosystem expansion and bridging legacy banking systems with Web3 technologies.



What You'll Do

 - Serve as a high-impact extension of the CEO and executive team, leading and executing top-priority initiatives—from scaling liquidity and financial operations to launching go-to-market strategies, managing vendor transitions, and supporting fundraising and investor communications.

 - Partner with internal teams (e.g., Product, Engineering, Compliance, Legal) and external vendors to establish robust systems for financial operations, regulatory reporting, and KYC/AML. Balance startup speed with the rigor required in a highly scrutinized space.

 - Act as a thought partner to founders and senior leadership, owning board meeting preparation, strategic offsites, and synthesizing operating plans and priorities. Help craft and evolve the company’s roadmap in alignment with its mission and market opportunities.

 - Champion Consistency, Systems Thinking, and Scale bycreating tools, documentation, and repeatable processes that reduce operational drag and scale knowledge across the team. Leverage automation, dashboards, and AI-assisted tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to increase leverage per head.



What We're Looking For

 - 7–10+ years of experience in business operations, strategy, finance, product operations, or consulting—preferably in early-stage crypto, fintech, or at top-tier consulting firms.

 - Prior experience supporting C-suite or acting as Chief of Staff, Business Operations lead, or Strategy Consultant with a strong track record supporting C-suite leadership and managing high-stakes, ambiguous projects.

 - Deep project management experience with cross-functional scope; you know how to structure and deliver work with accountability from concept to execution.

 -

notes: No tech roles posted, but company description suggests tech involvement
